allow_growth.reason: Dependency growth is never allowed under the stdlib-only rule. Any positive delta must emit an overflow finding. Zero tolerance for new runtime dependencies.

SP13 bootstrap + X0-X3 keystone/harness evidence and tooling since v0.5.21: SP13 plan + launch prompt (2); X0 lessons.jsonl + iteration_kpis.jsonl + worker_worktree_setup.sh (3); X1 instruction-lint gate scripts/check_instruction_lint.py + scripts/instruction_lint_baseline.json + tests/test_check_instruction_lint.py (3); X1/X2/X3 process docs SP13 ledger + self-application-checklist.md + amendment-proposals/TEMPLATE.md + eval_complexity-audit.json (4) and the X3 SP14-CANDIDATES.md freeze doc (1).
